rules: Historical migration filenames are immutable and must not be renamed after deployment.
Intent and historical naming clarifications must be recorded in this manifest.
Validation must fail if a SQL migration file exists without a manifest entry, or vice versa.

migrations.intent: Create foundational runs and audit_events tables.
Add run lifecycle status/timestamp columns and status constraint.
Add backtest/replay schema including md_bars and run_events.
Add md_quality_reports ingest quality table and index.
Add outbox claim tracking columns for dispatcher claim-lock semantics.
Add singleton sys_arm_state table for fail-closed persisted arm state.
Add broker_order_map persistence for crash-safe cancel/replace recovery.
Add reconcile checkpoint watermark persistence.
Add/strengthen DB constraints enforcing allowed state values and relationships.
Add idempotency constraints for outbox/inbox safety.
Add inbox applied tracking column(s) for atomic apply semantics.
Remove implicit default from reconcile checkpoint timestamp field(s).
Add/repair FK relationship between broker mapping and outbox rows.
Add consistency checks around outbox claim metadata/state transitions.
Scope inbox dedupe uniqueness to run identity.
Add explicit DISPATCHING outbox state support.
Expand arm-state disarm reasons to include recovery quarantine semantics.
Held alternative migration for global broker_fill_id uniqueness; not part of deployed chain.
Create runtime_leader_lease, runtime_control_state, and runtime_restart_requests tables.
migrations.filename_note: Filename mentions outbox dispatching, but deployed content establishes runtime leader/control/restart tables. Name is preserved for migration-history safety.

migrations.intent: Add durable broker_event_cursor table for restart-safe event consumption.
Add explicit AMBIGUOUS outbox status and supporting constraints.
Add explicit broker identity/lineage columns on inbox rows.
Add durable operator truth tables for risk block and reconcile status.
Extend sys_arm_state.reason constraints to include operator/runtime lease and deadman disarm reasons already used by durable control surfaces.
Add unique economic fill dedupe on (run_id, broker_fill_id) while preserving transport-message dedupe.
Add missing enriched inbox identity columns used by current insert contract and backfill defaults for existing rows.
Add durable risk_denial_events table for persisted risk denial event history.
Add durable sys_strategy_suppressions table for restart-safe strategy suppression persistence (CC-02).
